creator: bsdfan@nurfuerspam.de
text:
Hello,

I approve the patch.

I am the maintainer, but I found that I cannot send e-mail with the 
sourceforge.net as sender address.

Please change my mail address to the sender address from this e-mail if 
you commit this.

Regards
Markus Dolze


Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/lcdproc,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105015 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105015
>
